texto: I saw God wash the world last nightWith His sweet showers on high and then when morning came i saw Him hang it out to dryHe washed it each blade of grassand every trembling tree;He flung His showers against the hills and swept the rolling seathe white rose is a cleaner whitethe red, a richer redSince God washed every fragrant faceand put them to bedtheres not a bird theres not a beethe wings along the way but is a cleaner bird or beethan it was yesterdayi saw God wash the world last nightah would He wash meas clean of all my dust and dirtas that old birch tree!
explicacao: Citação de Dr. W. L. Stiger sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I saw God wash the world last nightWith His sweet showers on high and then when morning came i sa…” articula sucesso, god, poetry em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e boa-noite.
